title: Plastic Vastu Pyramid
shortDescription: Lightweight plastic vastu pyramid for balancing energies and improving positivity.
description: The Plastic Vastu Pyramid is designed according to vastu principles to enhance positive energy flow and reduce negative vibrations in homes, offices, and commercial spaces. Its lightweight and durable construction makes it easy to install in various locations for effective vastu correction and energy balancing. Ideal for study rooms, entrances, workspaces, and meditation areas.
benefits: Easy to install in any space
Suitable for home and office use

title: Wooden Vastu Pyramid
shortDescription: Premium wooden vastu pyramid for natural energy balancing and spiritual harmony.
description: The Wooden Vastu Pyramid is crafted from high-quality wood and designed to create a peaceful and harmonious environment. Wood symbolizes growth, stability, and natural balance, making this pyramid ideal for vastu remedies, meditation spaces, offices, and homes. It helps improve positivity, concentration, and overall energetic harmony.
benefits: Ideal for meditation and spiritual spaces
